data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific capability type definition
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the definition and properties of a specific capability type within a target type. Capability types define the fault injection actions available for a particular target type in a specified location. Returns the CapabilityType object containing metadata, description, and supported parameters for the capability.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about what a capability type is in the domain context, the hierarchical relationship (capability type within target type), location specificity, and what the response contains. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to use it.

data.current_summary: List available operations for the Chaos Studio provider
data.description_suggestion: Lists all available operations supported by the Microsoft.Chaos provider. Returns a collection of operation metadata including operation names, descriptions, and supported HTTP methods. This operation is typically used for API discovery and to determine what actions can be performed on Chaos Studio resources.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. However, description is missing entirely. Added explanation of what the operation returns (operation metadata), the purpose (API discovery), and context about how this operation fits into the API's overall structure. This improves AI agent interpretability for determining when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'cancelExperiment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added context about what cancellation does (stops fault injection), state requirements, return value, and side effects (immediate termination of chaos actions) for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Cancels an active chaos engineering experiment, stopping any ongoing fault injection activities. Requires the experiment to be in a running state. Returns the updated experiment object with status changed to cancelled. This operation terminates all active chaos actions immediately and prevents further execution steps.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added context about what cancellation does (stops fault injection), state requirements, return value, and side effects (immediate termination of chaos actions) for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'listExperimentExecutions' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but description is missing. Added information about pagination, return type, what execution records contain, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to call this operation and what to expect.

data.current_summary: List all executions of an experiment
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all execution records for a specified chaos engineering experiment. Returns ExperimentExecutionListResult containing execution history with details about each run including status, start time, and completion status. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters. Useful for tracking experiment run history and analyzing past chaos injection activities.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is missing. Added information about pagination, return type, what execution records contain, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to call this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getExperimentExecution' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description is missing. Added details about what the operation returns (ExperimentExecution object with status, timeline, results), and clarified use cases for monitoring and analysis to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific execution of a chaos engineering experiment. Returns an ExperimentExecution object containing execution status, timeline, results, and any errors or warnings encountered during the chaos injection run. Use this to monitor experiment progress or analyze results after execution completion.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added details about what the operation returns (ExperimentExecution object with status, timeline, results), and clarified use cases for monitoring and analysis to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'listTargets' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description is missing. Added context about what targets are (resources eligible for chaos experiments), what the operation returns, and why targets matter for chaos engineering to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all chaos engineering targets configured for a specified Azure resource.
